features.bnrRates: Automatic BNR exchange rates per transaction

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes. The quick calculator is 100% free — no account needed. You enter your totals and get your tax estimate instantly.
faq.q2: What does the paid plan add?
faq.a2: Upload your Trading212 PDF or CSV statement and get an automatic, detailed breakdown per security — capital gains, dividends, BNR rates, CASS, and a D212-ready guide. No manual work.
faq.a3: No. It's a one-time annual payment. You pay once and get 365 days of access. No auto-renewal, no recurring charges.
faq.a4: Yes. Contact us within 14 days of purchase for a full refund, no questions asked.
faq.a5: We use the official BNR exchange rates, the weighted average cost method required by Romanian tax law, and apply the tax rules valid for tax year 2025: 10% capital gains tax on income through non-resident brokers (Trading212, IBKR, eToro, Revolut), plus CASS and dividend tax per the fiscal code. All amounts are converted to RON.
faq.a6: Your uploaded statements are processed and never shared. You can export or delete all your data at any time from Settings. We never sell user data.
faq.a7: Currently Trading212 (PDF and CSV). Revolut and Interactive Brokers are coming soon.
faq.q8: Does this apply to tax year 2026?
faq.a8: No. Starting January 1, 2026, Law 239/2025 changed the tax rate to 16% for capital gains through non-resident brokers (Trading212, Interactive Brokers, eToro, Revolut). For Romania-resident brokers (XTB Romania, Tradeville, BT Capital Partners, etc.), withholding at source applies at 3% or 6% depending on holding period. InvesTax calculates taxes on income earned in 2025, filed via Declarația Unică by May 25, 2026. We will update the calculator for tax year 2026 before the 2027 filing season.

trustBadge: Built by a Romanian developer who filed his own Declarația Unică — the painful way
